title: Retrain Your Brain_ Cognitive Behavioral Therapy in 7 Weeks
book: Retrain Your Brain_ Cognitive Behavioral Therapy in 7 Weeks

node_types.description: A type or modality of psychological therapy, including its principles, techniques, and target conditions.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the therapy type (e.g., CBT, Psychoanalysis, Exposure and Response Prevention)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Summary of the therapy's approach and principles

properties.name: target_conditions
properties.description: List of mental health conditions this therapy is used to treat

properties.name: key_techniques
properties.description: Core techniques or interventions used in this therapy

properties.name: evidence_base
properties.description: Summary of research evidence supporting this therapy

properties.name: session_structure
properties.description: Typical structure, duration, and format of sessions

properties.name: cultural_considerations
properties.description: Notes on cultural or religious alignment, if applicable

node_types.description: A diagnosable mental health disorder or syndrome, including its features, diagnostic criteria, and prevalence.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the mental health condition (e.g., Major Depressive Disorder, Panic Disorder)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Summary of the condition and its impact

properties.name: diagnostic_criteria
properties.description: Key criteria for diagnosis (e.g., DSM-5)

properties.name: prevalence
properties.description: Prevalence statistics and demographic information

properties.name: risk_factors
properties.description: Known risk factors and vulnerabilities

properties.name: symptoms
properties.description: List of core symptoms

properties.name: subtypes_specifiers
properties.description: Recognized subtypes or specifiers (e.g., melancholic features, peripartum onset)

node_types.description: A core principle or foundational concept of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the CBT principle (e.g., present-focused, goal-oriented)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Explanation of the principle and its role in therapy

node_types.description: A specific intervention, exercise, or skill used within CBT.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the technique (e.g., exposure, cognitive restructuring, behavioral activation)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of how the technique is applied

properties.name: target_symptoms
properties.description: Symptoms or problems this technique addresses

node_types.description: A psychological or physical symptom relevant to mental health conditions.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the symptom (e.g., low mood, panic attacks)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the symptom

node_types.description: A therapeutic or personal goal set during treatment planning.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the goal

properties.name: is_individualized
properties.description: Whether the goal is tailored to the individual

properties.name: related_values
properties.description: Personal values connected to the goal

node_types.description: A personal value or meaningful life domain identified in therapy.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Description of the value or life domain

node_types.description: A standardized or self-report tool for assessing symptoms or progress.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the assessment tool

properties.name: description
properties.description: Purpose and structure of the tool

properties.name: target_conditions
properties.description: Conditions or symptoms the tool assesses

node_types.description: A pharmacological treatment relevant to mental health conditions.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the medication (e.g., SSRI, benzodiazepine)

properties.name: description
properties.description: Summary of the medication's use and effects

properties.name: target_conditions
properties.description: Conditions the medication is prescribed for

edge_types.description: Indicates that a therapy type is used to treat a specific mental health condition.
Indicates that a therapy type employs a specific technique or intervention.
Indicates that a CBT technique is designed to address a particular symptom.
Indicates that a mental health condition is characterized by a specific symptom.
Indicates that a CBT principle underlies or guides a specific technique.
Indicates that a therapeutic goal is aligned with a personal value.
Indicates that an assessment tool is used to evaluate a mental health condition.
Indicates that a medication is used to treat a specific mental health condition.
